violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

Pastelitos were observed held at 110 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were recently prepared; Foods were reheated and hot holding unit was adjusted during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

Open air case was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 40-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Active service was being conducted during time of inspection. Equipment must be repaired/ replaced/ adjusted and maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less prior to use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Exterior of establishment was observed with an accumulation of litter and broken glass. Exterior to be maintained cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

-Various foods in the retail open air case were observed held at (50-61) degrees Fahrenheit. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. See disposal list. -Potato salad and pasta salad were observed at 50 degrees in the cold holding bar. Foods were recently prepared. Foods were placed into walk-in cooler to chill. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

Open air case was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 44-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service to hold food items that require refrigeration for food safety. Equipment must be repaired/ replaced/ adjusted and maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. shelving in the walk-in cooler 2. fanguards and condenser in the walk-in cooler 3. shelving at retail open air case 4. glass doors, tracks, and frames of meat display cases 5. honeycomb filters for open air cases 6. produce shelving New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Plumbing at handsink and 3 bay sink in meatcutting area was observed leaking when in use. System to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The floors in the walk-in cooler and the ceiling in the basement has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Exterior of establishment was observed with an accumulation of litter and broken glass. Exterior to be maintained cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
Opening observed by front window. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Ceiling tiles in the retail area are in poor repair (water damage) and/or missing. Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Some floor tiles in the retail area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
Ceiling tiles in the ice machine area are in poor repair, stained from previous water damage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen and meat area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
The faucet and plumbing under the 3 bay sink are in poor repair. Plumbing and faucet observed leaking. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
Some floor tiles in the retail area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024
Ceiling tiles in the ice machine area are in poor repair, stained from previous water damage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The floor in the retail and under fryolators area has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and oil. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food cooked beets with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. food item was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of the vegetable chopper was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Dairy and produce unit were observed held between 44-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Working containers of sugar, salt, coffee are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

There was standing water in the blender which was stored as clean. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils shall be air-dried or used after adequate draining. Blender was washed, rinsed, and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Hot hold serving lids at the steam table were observed not in good repair (chipped). All broken lids were disposed and changed at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen and meat area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the open case produce unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
The faucet and plumbing under the 3 bay sink are in poor repair. Plumbing and faucet observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
Some floor tiles in the retail area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
Ceiling tiles in the ice machine area are in poor repair, stained from previous water damage. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The floor in the retail and under fryolators area has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and oil. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the equipment storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the ( ) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
